p.c: exists(k0: Subfield[F], k1: Subfield[E]) { subfield_le[F](k0, subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, k1)) != subfield_le[E](subfield_image[F, E](phi, k0), k1) }
let w0: Subfield[F] satisfy { exists(k0: Subfield[E]) { subfield_le[F](w0, subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, k0)) != subfield_le[E](subfield_image[F, E](phi, w0), k0) } }
let w1: Subfield[E] satisfy { subfield_le[E](subfield_image[F, E](phi, w0), w1) != subfield_le[F](w0, subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, w1)) }
let w2: Subfield[E] satisfy { subfield_le[E](subfield_image[F, E](phi, w0), w2) != subfield_le[F](w0, subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, w2)) }
function(x0: Subfield[F], x1: Subfield[E]) { subfield_le[E](subfield_image[F, E](phi, x0), x1) = subfield_le[F](x0, subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, x1)) }(w0, w2)

function[T0: Field, T1: Field](x0: FieldHom[T0, T1], x1: Subfield[T0]) { subfield_preimage[T0, T1](x0, subfield_image[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = subfield_image_preimage_closure[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[F, E](phi, s)

goal: subfield_le[E](subfield_image[F, E](phi, s), subfield_image[F, E](phi, t))
subfield_le[F](subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, subfield_image[F, E](phi, s)), subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, subfield_image[F, E](phi, t)))

p.c: function[T0: Field, T1: Field](x0: FieldHom[T0, T1], x1: Subfield[T0]) { subfield_preimage[T0, T1](x0, subfield_image[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = subfield_image_preimage_closure[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[F, E](phi, t)

function[T0: Field, T1: Field](x0: FieldHom[T0, T1], x1: Subfield[T0]) { subfield_preimage[T0, T1](x0, subfield_image[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = subfield_image_preimage_closure[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[F, E](phi, s)

goal: subfield_le[E](subfield_image[F, E](phi, s), subfield_image[F, E](phi, t)) = subfield_le[F](s, subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, subfield_image[F, E](phi, t)))
subfield_image_preimage_closure[F, E](phi, t) = subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, subfield_image[F, E](phi, t))

p.c: function[T0: Field, T1: Field](x0: FieldHom[T0, T1], x1: Subfield[T0]) { subfield_preimage[T0, T1](x0, subfield_image[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = subfield_image_preimage_closure[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[F, E](phi, t)

goal: subfield_le[F](s, subfield_image_preimage_closure[F, E](phi, t)) = subfield_le[F](s, subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, subfield_image[F, E](phi, t)))
subfield_le[F](s, subfield_image_preimage_closure[F, E](phi, t)) = subfield_le[E](subfield_image[F, E](phi, s), subfield_image[F, E](phi, t))

p.c: function[T0: Field, T1: Field](x0: FieldHom[T0, T1], x1: Subfield[T0]) { subfield_preimage[T0, T1](x0, subfield_image[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = subfield_image_preimage_closure[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[F, E](phi, s)

function[T0: Field, T1: Field](x0: FieldHom[T0, T1], x1: Subfield[T0]) { subfield_preimage[T0, T1](x0, subfield_image[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = subfield_image_preimage_closure[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[F, E](phi, s)
function[T0: Field, T1: Field](x0: FieldHom[T0, T1], x1: Subfield[T1]) { subfield_image[T0, T1](x0, subfield_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = subfield_image_preimage_kernel[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[F, E](phi, t)
function[T0: Field, T1: Field](x0: FieldHom[T0, T1], x1: Subfield[T1]) { subfield_image[T0, T1](x0, subfield_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = subfield_image_preimage_kernel[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[F, E](phi, t)

goal: subfield_le[E](subfield_image[F, E](phi, subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, s)), t) = subfield_le[F](subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, s), subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, t))
subfield_image_preimage_kernel[F, E](phi, s) = subfield_image[F, E](phi, subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, s))

p.c: function[T0: Field, T1: Field](x0: FieldHom[T0, T1], x1: Subfield[T1]) { subfield_image[T0, T1](x0, subfield_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = subfield_image_preimage_kernel[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[F, E](phi, s)

goal: subfield_le[E](subfield_image_preimage_kernel[F, E](phi, s), t) = subfield_le[E](subfield_image[F, E](phi, subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, s)), t)
subfield_le[E](subfield_image_preimage_kernel[F, E](phi, s), t) = subfield_le[F](subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, s), subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, t))
subfield_le[F](subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, s), subfield_preimage[F, E](phi, t))
